style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, arranged in two horizontal zones. The LOWER zone is a dense, teeming field of many tiny uniform tokens, small plants, leaves, worms, and scattered dots suggesting soil microbes, none individually labelled, captioned PROCESSUS DE BAS NIVEAU. The UPPER zone shows a small panel of three simple aggregate gauges labelled SANTÉ DU SYSTÈME, with a single simple observer token reading the panel, captioned NIVEAU MÉTA. A thin dashed line separates the zones, with a few summary arrows rising from the field to the gauges. A small caption below reads GÉRER LE SYSTÈME, PAS L'ORGANISME. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond a simple token. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
